BlueMoonVineyard.Name: Blue Moon Vineyard
BlueMoonVineyard.Description: Sophia's wine vineyard, inherited after her parents died.

CindersapForest.Name: Cindersap Forest
CindersapForest.Description: Forest with Leah's cabin, Marnie's Ranch, Wizard's Tower, Blue Moon Vineyard, Fairhaven Farm, foraging, and the traveling cart.

FairhavenFarm.Name: Fairhaven Farm
FairhavenFarm.Description: Andy's traditional farm in Cindersap Forest.

AuroraVineyard.Name: Aurora Vineyard
AuroraVineyard.Description: Magical vineyard and forest home of Apples the Junimo.

Grampleton.Name: Grampleton
Grampleton.Description: Neighboring town reached by Shearwater Bridge, linked to Scarlett, Hank, Treyvon, and Andy's family.

Highlands.Name: Highlands
Highlands.Description: Mountainous explorable area with Lance, monsters, and late-game challenges.
